snippet.title: Doob Gaye (Official Video) Guru Randhawa | Urvashi Rautela | Jaani, B Praak | Remo D | Bhushan K
snippet.description:
Gulshan Kumar and T-Series presents Bhushan Kumar's "Doob Gaye" a brand new song in the voice of “Guru Randhawa” featuring Urvashi Rautela lyrics by Jaani & music by B Praak. The video is directed by Remo D'Souza.

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 4 | Plan B Kya Hai?
snippet.description:
Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

UPSC is one of the toughest exams in the world with a success rate of less than 1%. As an Aspirant, you can’t ignore the fact that you might not crack it. Abhilash realizes this after talking to SK and Guri, they tell him everyone needs a Plan B. On the other hand, he is also being pressured by his company to end his sabbatical and join again. What will Abhilash do now? What will be his Plan B?

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC: Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Participate in the Unacademy Combat, a weekly scholarship test for UPSC SCE. Use code ASPIRANTS2021 to take the test and compete with peers across the country. Top rankers will also stand a chance to get up to 100% scholarship from a pool worth Rs 1 Crore.

snippet.title: FACT CHECK: Will there be lockdown from May 3?
snippet.description:
🔹3 ਮਈ ਨੂੰ ਹੋਣ ਜਾ ਰਿਹਾ ਮੁਕੰਮਲ ਲੌਕਡਾਊਨ ? 
🔹ਦਿੱਲੀ, ਮਹਾਰਾਸ਼ਟਰ ਤੋਂ ਕੁਝ ਸਿੱਖਿਆ ਪੰਜਾਬ ?
🔹ਅਫਵਾਹਾਂ ਤੋਂ ਬਚਾਉਣ ਲਈ ਤੇ ਕੋਰੋਨਾ ਕਾਲ 'ਚ ਜ਼ਰੂਰਤ ਮੰਦਾਂ ਦੀ  ਮਦਦ ਲਈ ਵੱਧ ਤੋਂ ਵੱਧ ਕਰੋ ਸ਼ੇਅਰ ਇਹ ਵੀਡੀਓ 

Lockdown in India? While coronavirus cases in India have been rising exponentially, there have been speculations that the PM Narendra Modi-led NDA government may again impose a nationwide lockdown from May 3 to contain the spread of COVID-19.

Read More: https://www.ptcnews.tv/fact-check-will-there-be-lockdown-from-may-3-en/

snippet.title: Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega (Official Video) Vishal Mishra | Aly Goni, Jasmin Bhasin | VYRL Originals
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents the multi award-winning singer-composer Vishal Mishra’s Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega featuring Bigg Boss fame and popular couple Aly Goni and Jasmin Bhasin. The song has been written by Vishal Mishra and Kaushal Kishore narrating this story from a female perspective. The Music Video has been directed by Navjit Buttar and has been shot in a grand scale. Watch Aly & Jasmin in a never before seen avatar, showcasing skilfully the pain and anguish of a toxic relationship. You are in for a surprise as the story unfolds to a shocking end.

localized.title: Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega (Official Video) Vishal Mishra | Aly Goni, Jasmin Bhasin | VYRL Originals
localized.description:
VYRL Originals presents the multi award-winning singer-composer Vishal Mishra’s Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega featuring Bigg Boss fame and popular couple Aly Goni and Jasmin Bhasin. The song has been written by Vishal Mishra and Kaushal Kishore narrating this story from a female perspective. The Music Video has been directed by Navjit Buttar and has been shot in a grand scale. Watch Aly & Jasmin in a never before seen avatar, showcasing skilfully the pain and anguish of a toxic relationship. You are in for a surprise as the story unfolds to a shocking end.

Produced by Naveen Bhandari, Directed by Smruti R and Music Directed by Asad Nizam. Amara Muzik is the official Music Label of Hela Ki Prema.

Lyrics:
Chaluni aaji mu chale bata
Duniya Laguchi mote choto
Kholuni aaji mu moro otha
Kiye se kejani gaye geeta
Akasha ta, mati sathe, mise jouthi 
Mana moro, haji gala, seithi
Sapana ku, Aakhi Basi, khoje jouthi
Nida Moro, Haji Gala, Seithi
Emiti hela mo, jibane Prathama
Kahi de, kahi de, hela ki prema
Kahi de kahi de hela ki prema
Kahi de kahi de hela ki prema
Kahi de kahi de hela ki prema
Kiye Dela mote chuin 
Nija bhitare mu nahi
Sabu kichi, lagila Mote bhala
Jani parilini Kehi, Ete Ranga Boli hei
Kete bele, futile ae, phula
Faguna ta, phula saathe, gape jouthi
Gapa Basi, Lekhili Mu, Seithi
Bhanra ta, gunu gunu, Gaye jouthi
Pada moro, nachi jaye, seithi
Emiti hela mo, jibane Prathama
Kahi de kahi de hela ki prema
Kahi de kahi de hela ki prema
Nija Naa moro kahin, mane aaji padu nahi
Kehi jadi, pachare rahe tuni
Bhabe sina gote katha 
Kahe aau gote katha
Kala ae, hrudaya beimani
Hrudaya ta, chati tale, thaye jouthi
Lucheili, tate nei, seithe
Bhabana ta, hei jaye, sata jouthi
Mote Khoji, paili mu, seithi
 Emiti hela mo Jibane Prathama

Kahi De kahi de hela ki prema
Kahi de kahi de hela ki prema
Kahi de kahi de hela ki prema

snippet.title: Covid Updates: রাজ্য জুড়ে আজ থেকে আংশিক লকডাউন, চালু থাকবে জরুরি পরিষেবা
snippet.description:
আজ থেকে রাজ্য জুড়ে আংশিক লকডাউন ঘোষণা করল রাজ্য সরকার। করোনা মোকাবিলা করতে অনির্দিষ্টকালের জন্য রাজ্যে বন্ধ থাকবে শপিং মল, সিনেমা হল, স্পা, জিম ও রেস্তোরাঁ। চালু থাকবে হোম ডেলিভারি। সকাল ৭টা থেকে ১০টা এবং দুপুর ৩টে থেকে ৫টা পর্যন্ত খোলা থাকবে বাজার। শুধুমাত্র ওষুধের দোকান ও জরুরি পরিষেবার দোকানগুলি খোলা থাকবে বলে জানানো হয়েছে। পাশাপাশি ভোটের ফল প্রকাশের পর বিজয় মিছিল নির্বাচন কমিশনের নির্দেশ অনুযায়ী করার কথাও বলা হয়েছে।

#BengaliNews #ABPAnanda #ABPAnandaLive #Covid #Corona #LockDown #BengalCovid

snippet.title: Ramyug | Official Trailer | Kunal Kohli | MX Original Series | MX Player
snippet.description:
Ek andekhe roop mein धर्म aur अधर्म ka paath padhaane aa raha hai रामयुग!

All episodes of #Ramyug out on 6th May.

Directed by Kunal Kohli

Key Cast: Diganth Manchale, Akkshay Dogra, Aishwarya Ojha, Kabir Duhan Singh, Vivan Bhatena, Navdeep Pallapolu, Anish John Kokken, Shishir Mohan Sharma, Jatin Sial, Shweta Gulati, Suparna Marwah, Mamta Verma, Tisca Chopra, Dalip Tahil, Anup Soni, Vikram Singh Chauhan, Hemant Kumar Pandey, Arun Singh, Ravi Jhankal, Shaan Grover, Amit Madan Gaur, Teena Singh and Danish Akhtar

About Ramyug: 
Rama, prince of Ayodhya, won the hand of the beautiful princess Sita, but was exiled with her and his brother Laksmana for 14 years through the plotting of his stepmother. In the forest, Sita was abducted by Ravana, and Rama with the help of Son of Vayu, Hanuman, gathered an army of monkeys and bears to search for her. The allies attacked Lanka, killed Ravana, and rescued Sita. After the couple's triumphant return to Ayodhya, Rama's righteous rule (Ram-raj) inaugurated a golden age for all mankind. 

The epic's poetic stature and marvelous story means that the story of Rama has been constantly retold by some of India's greatest writers both in Sanskrit and regional languages. It is one of the staples of various dramatic traditions, in court drama, dance-dramas, and in shadow-puppet theatres. In northern India, the annual Ram-lila or 'Rama-play' is performed at the autumn festival of Dassehra to celebrate with Rama and Sita the eventual triumph of light over darkness.

Ramyug the latest visual interpretation of this ancient text, seeks to bring modern technology in a never before used manner to narrate the epic.

#MXOriginalSeries #MXPlayer #KunalKohli #DiganthManchale #AkkshayDogra #AishwaryaOjha #KabirDuhanSingh #VivanBhatena #NavdeepPallapolu #AnishJohnKokken #ShishirMohanSharma #JatinSial #ShwetaGulati #SuparnaMarwah #MamtaVerma #TiscaChopra #DalipTahil #AnupSoni #VikramSinghChauhan #HemantKumarPandey #ArunSingh #RaviJhankal #ShaanGrover #AmitMadanGaur #TeenaSingh #DanishAkhtar

In the forest, Sita was abducted by Ravana, and Rama with the help of Son of Vayu, Hanuman, gathered an army of monkeys and bears to search for her. The allies attacked Lanka, killed Ravana, and rescued Sita. After the couple's triumphant return to Ayodhya, Rama's righteous rule (Ram-raj) inaugurated a golden age for all mankind. 

The epic's poetic stature and marvelous story means that the story of Rama has been constantly retold by some of India's greatest writers both in Sanskrit and regional languages. It is one of the staples of various dramatic traditions, in court drama, dance-dramas, and in shadow-puppet theatres. In northern India, the annual Ram-lila or 'Rama-play' is performed at the autumn festival of Dassehra to celebrate with Rama and Sita the eventual triumph of light over darkness.

Ramyug the latest visual interpretation of this ancient text, seeks to bring modern technology in a never before used manner to narrate the epic.

#SunTV #Chithi2 #TamilSerial #Chithi2Serial #Fullepisode #VenbaKavin #KavinVenba

snippet.title: वैशाख मास की चौथ की कहानी | Vaishakh maas ki chauth ki kahani | बड़ी चौथ की कथा | संकट चौथ की कथा
snippet.description:
वैशाख मास की चौथ की कहानी | Vaishakh maas ki chauth ki kahani | बड़ी चौथ की कथा | संकट चौथ की कथा
आज 30 अप्रैल 2021 को वैशाख मास की कृष्ण पक्ष की चतुर्थी के दिन मैं आप सभी के समक्ष वैशाख चौथ की कथा प्रस्तुत कर रही हूं। वैशाख चौथ को वैशाख संकष्टी चतुर्थी, बड़ी चौथ,  संकट चौथ, संकटा चौथ,  सकट चौथ आदि नामों से जाना जाता है। साल भर में 12 संकष्टी चतुर्थी आती है। सभी चतुर्थी तिथियों में वैशाख , भादों , कार्तिक , माघ की चतुर्थी की बड़ी चतुर्थी कहा जाता है | जो लोग पुरे 12 महीने  के चौथ  माता के व्रत का संकल्प करते हैं उन्हें वैशाख की बड़ी चौथ से व्रत का प्रारंभ करना चाहिए | 
 वैशाख की बड़ी चौथ का व्रत स्त्रियां अपने सुहाग की रक्षा, तथा संतान की मंगल कामना के लिए रखती हैं।

 वैशाख मास की चौथ के दिन चौथ माता तथा गणेश भगवान की पूजा की जाती है। वैशाख चौथ के दिन चंद्रमा को    दिए बिना व्रत पूरा नहीं  माना जाता।  वैशाख कृष्ण पक्ष की चतुर्थी के दिन सुबह सवेरे  नहा धोकर बड़ी चौथ के व्रत का संकल्प लिया जाता है। पूरा दिन मन ही मन गणेश भगवान तथा चौथ माता को याद किया जाता है। शाम को  फिर से स्नान करके स्वच्छ वस्त्र धारण करें।  श्री गणेश भगवान और चौथ माता को  गुड और देसी घी के चूरमे का प्रसाद चढ़ाएं। उसके बाद वैशाख बड़ी चौथ की कथा सुने। फिर चंद्रमा उदय होने के पश्चात चंद्रमा को अर्घ्य दें।  अर्घ्य देने के बाद भोजन करें ।
 आइए शुरू करते हैं वैशाख मास की बड़ी चौथ की कथा
Today, on 30 April 2021, on the fourth day of the Krishna Paksha of Vaishakh month, I am presenting the story of Vaishakh Chauth to all of you. Vaishakh Chauth is known by the names of Vaishakh Sankashti Chaturthi, Badi Chauth, Sankat Chauth, Sankata Chauth, Sakat Chauth etc. 12 Sankashti Chaturthi falls throughout the year. All Chaturthi dates are called Vaishakha, Bhado, Karthik, Badi Chaturthi of Magh Chaturthi. Those who pledge for the entire 12-month Chautha Mata fast should start the fast with a big Chauth of Vaishakh.
 The women keep the fast of Vaishakh Badi Chauth for the protection of their sweetheart, and to wish the child well.
 Chauth Mata and Lord Ganesha are worshiped on the fourth day of Vaishakh month. The fast is not considered complete without the moon being given on the day of Vaishakh Chauth. On the morning of Vaishakha Krishna Paksha Chaturthi, in the morning, taking a bath and taking a bath, a vow of Badi Chauth is resolved. Lord Ganesha and Chauth Mata are remembered throughout the day. In the evening, bathe again and wear clean clothes. Offer pudding of good and desi ghee to Shri Ganesh Bhagwan and Chauth Mata. After that, listen to the story of Vaisakh Badi Chauth. Then after the moon rises, offer the moon to the arghya. Take food after offering arghya.
 Let's start the story of Badi Chauth of Vaishakh month

There are 4 badi chauth in a year. Vaishakh chauth is one among them. On the of vaishakh chauth people pray to chauth mata

snippet.title: Kareeb | Goldie Sohel | Siddharth Nigam | Ashi Singh | Vishal D |Kunaal V |Official Video |TM Music
snippet.description:
When a crush leads to playful flirting and ends up as love! 
This is what Kareeb is about. A fun, peppy song, composed by Goldie Sohel to Kunaal Vermaa's lyrics, sung by Vishal Dadlani, will appeal to millennials and also create nostalgia for many from older generations.

#Kareeb #SiddharthNigam #AshiSingh

----------------------------------------------------------------
Music Composed by Goldie Sohel
Written by Kunaal Vermaa
Singer - Vishal Dadlani

Music Produced and Arranged by Goldie Sohel
Sound Designer - Manash Borthakur

Guitars - Ishan Das 
Bass - Himangshu Borah 
Saxophones - I D Rao 
Backing Vocals Arranged and designed by Shreya Phukan

Vishal's Vocals recorded at YRF studios by Vijay Dayal
Vocal Design and Edit by DJ Phukan
Instruments and Backing Vocals recorded at Neo Sound by Pranjal Borah

Mixed by Pankaj Borah at Neo Sound 
Mix Assistant - Pranjal Borah 

Mastered by Sunny M.R.

Video:
Featuring - Siddharth Nigam & Ashi Singh
Video Director - United White Flag - Ramji Gulati
Choreographed by - Shashank Dogra
Casting by - Purple Star Entertainment - Forum Vaghela
DOP - Rahul Arora
Editor - Varun Arora
VFX - Vishal Panchal
Drone - Tanish Arora
Styling - Dharti Gulati
Production - Akshay Kapoor (Aay Kay Dubai)
Makeup & Hair - Ishan Malhotra
Photography - Anish Ajmera
Team UWF - Aashish Prasad, Dr. Deep, Mr. Hit
----------------------------------------------------------------

♪Stream the Full Song Here♪

Amazon Music - Apple Music - Gaana - Spotify - Wynk - Jio Saavn - Hungama - Resso - YouTube Music.

Connect with the song: https://tmmusic.fanlink.to/Kareeb

----------------------------------------------------------------
Lyrics :

Dekha tune
Dekha Maine
Chori Chori Yun to sau dafa
Sau Dafa

Jeele thoda
Ho na jaaye
Baton baton mein hi yu subha
Yu Subha
Sau baaton ki baat hai ek main hu tera.. toh kya sochna
Koi karke bahana
Aajana mere kareeb
Koi karke bahana
Aajana mere kareeb

Aaya tu jab se nazron mein
Maine fir khwab dekha na
Hoga kal se ye khabron mein
Teri haan ki bachi hai deriyaan
Tu rahega mere zikron mein
Ab kabhi koi hoga na
Keh na paau chaahe lafzon mein
Phir bhi karta rahunga main bayaan
Tu chaahiye baaki Kar li hai
Maine saari tai yaariyan..
Koi karke bahana
Aajana mere kareeb
Koi karke bahana
Aajana mere kareeb
----------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: Telugu Food | Pakka Local | Fine Dine Hyderabad | Street Byte | Silly Monks |
snippet.description:
#HaleemHungama #StreetByte #BajajElectronics
 
Pakka local

Address: plot no.98, Rd Number 7, Imam Khomeini Rd, Banjara Hills, Hyderabad, Telangana

Address: HP Petrol Pump, Gachibowli Serilingampally Mandal, Gachibowli, Telangana 500032

Address: Plot 152, Gachibowli - Miyapur Rd, opp. Harsha Toyota (Kondapur) Sales, Service & U-Trust, Prashanth Nagar Colony, Kondapur, Telangana

Guess what guys?! WE'RE BACK! SEASON 3 OF HALEEM HUNGAMA with @bajajelectronicsindia IS OFFICIALLY HERE!! 

*The rules are as follows:*
- The contestants will take selfies of themselves holding a serving of Haleem and post it to their social media and use the hashtags *#BajajElectronics #StreetByte #Sillymonks #HaleemHungama
- A total of *30 members* will be chosen at the end of the contest. Prizes will be distributed to them over a period of *six days.* 
- *Five winners* per day will be called. Gift hampers will be distributed at *selected Bajaj Electronics stores*. The selection of winners and prize distribution will happen during the last few days of the campaign
(The more number of entries, the higher chance of you winning!) 

So get clicking!

Bajaj Ectronics  is one of Hyderabad's most premier chain of consumer electronics stores.
It started off as a dream in the year 1983 with the first Bajaj Electronics branch at Hyderabad. We earned the trust of the locals and grew from strength to strength, to what is now a chain of the most genuine electronic stores across twin cities, offering quality service at the best price. An extension to those services is this online outlet where you can choose from a wide display of the latest gadgets & appliances while availing some crazy offers on the side! It’s faster. It’s smarter!

What gives us the edge over other online stores is our presence in the city. More than 85 outlets are spread across the length and breadth of the city which offers the following advantages to its online buyers:

#StreetByte #BajajElectronics #HaleemHungama

Street Byte is all about E^3 - Explore. Eat. Enjoy! 
Subscribe to our YouTube channel and follow us on social media for regular updates. 

Official Street Byte merchandise is now here - https://spoilx.com/collections/street-byte

Subscribe - https://bit.ly/3cDrJDh

Hi Guys! In this video are going to discuss yet another important announcement issued by ICAI on 1 May 2021. 

As per the notification issued by ICAI, the institute has decided to re-open the online filling up of examination application forms for CA May 2021 exams. 

This announcement has been made by the ICAI in continuation of the May 2021 exams postponed announcement. ICAI has reopened the online application form for CA Final, CA Intermediate/IPCC & Post Qualification Course students.

The online application form for ICAI CA May 2021 Exam can now be filled from May 4 to May 6, 2021, till 11:59 pm.

snippet.description:
It’s the return of Angie Fierce! Or at least, the return of her wig… Talking Becca has been wearing it to gain confidence on a scary reality show. Can Becca’s friends bring her to her senses before the wig takes over?

Talking Tom & Friends: Catch up on the adventure so far! 👍

Although things rarely seem to work out the way they planned, they always have each other’s backs. And it’s that friendship, optimism, and sense of fun that make their adventures just too amazing to miss! 😁

snippet.title: अलविदा Rohit Sardana : PM Modi, President Ramnath Kovind सहित दिग्गज हस्तियों ने दी श्रद्धांजलि
snippet.description:
AajTak समाचार चैनल के वरिष्ठ पत्रकार और एंकर Rohit Sardana का निधन हो गया है. रोहित पिछले कुछ वक्त से कोविड से पीड़ित थे, वह उससे उबर ही रहे थे कि शुक्रवार दोपहर को हार्ट अटैक की वजह से उनका निधन हो गया. रोहित सरदाना के निधन की खबर से हर कोई स्तब्ध है और अपनी ओर से श्रद्धांजलि दे रहा है. प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी ने रोहित सरदाना के निधन पर शोक व्यक्त किया. PM Modi ने ट्वीट कर लिखा, ’रोहित सरदाना बेहद जल्दी हमें छोड़कर चले गए. भारत की प्रगति के लिए ऊर्जा से भरपूर थे और भावुक थे, रोहित को कई लोगों द्वारा याद किया जाएगा. रोहित के निधन ने मीडिया जगत में एक बहुत बड़ा शून्य छोड़ दिया है. उनके परिजनों, दोस्तों और चाहने वालों को सांत्वना, ऊं शांति’. 
#RohitSardana #PMModi #PresidentRamnathKovind

AajTak समाचार चैनल के वरिष्ठ पत्रकार और एंकर Rohit Sardana का निधन हो गया है. रोहित पिछले कुछ वक्त से कोविड से पीड़ित थे, वह उससे उबर ही रहे थे कि शुक्रवार दोपहर को हार्ट अटैक की वजह से उनका निधन हो गया. रोहित सरदाना के निधन की खबर से हर कोई स्तब्ध है और अपनी ओर से श्रद्धांजलि दे रहा है. प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी ने रोहित सरदाना के निधन पर शोक व्यक्त किया. PM Modi ने ट्वीट कर लिखा, ’रोहित सरदाना बेहद जल्दी हमें छोड़कर चले गए. भारत की प्रगति के लिए ऊर्जा से भरपूर थे और भावुक थे, रोहित को कई लोगों द्वारा याद किया जाएगा. रोहित के निधन ने मीडिया जगत में एक बहुत बड़ा शून्य छोड़ दिया है. उनके परिजनों, दोस्तों और चाहने वालों को सांत्वना, ऊं शांति’. 
#RohitSardana #PMModi #PresidentRamnathKovind


आजतक के साथ देखिये देश-विदेश की सभी महत्वपूर्ण और बड़ी खबरें | Watch the latest Hindi news Live on the World's Most Subscribed News Channel on YouTube.

snippet.title: 10 Day Breathing And Meditation Journey With Gurudev | Boost Your Immunity And Lung Capacity
snippet.description:
The Art of Living brings you the 10-Day Breathing and Meditation Journey With Gurudev.

Sign up and receive updates of this journey via WhatsApp on http://aoliv.in/10days

 Every day we will teach you powerful breathing exercises and an exclusive meditation with Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar that will:

Optimize your oxygen capacity
Strengthen your respiratory system
Reduce anxiety
Calm down the nervous system
Inculcate positive energy in your body and mind

Share this Free Masterclass with your family and friends and help them learn these powerful breathing exercises. Join in the Free Masterclass here: https://youtu.be/BKsw1abYwdg 

About Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar is a world-renowned humanitarian, spiritual leader, and an ambassador of peace and human values. Through his life and work, Gurudev has inspired millions around the world with a vision of a stress-free and violence-free world.
Gurudev founded The Art of Living, a non-profit organization that is engaged in stress-management and service initiatives. The programs designed by Gurudev empower people with techniques and tools to live a deeper and blissful life.

Music id - MB01R7AHSLPKZSP

#GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving

snippet.title: Matchday Live with Cheeka| Match 26 PBKS VS RCB| IPL 2021
snippet.description:
We are heading to the 26th game of the IPL &. its at the new Narendra Modi stadium at Ahmedabad. This years IPL has been slightly off the mark when it comes to excitement with to many one sided games, but now since we are heading to the latter part of the tournament there is a good chance for us to get some added excitement into the ipl. 

The Royal challengers bangalore take on the Boys from Punjab in what looks like an exciting battle on the cards. The punjab kings have rather had a very ordinary IPL except a show of brilliance against the Mumbai Indians.  punjab kings have suffered heavily due to their lack of bowling depth and they need to sort out that issue if they want to move forward in the IPL. 

RCB on the other hand have had a dream IPL so far by winning 6 out of their 7 games. Their batsman are looking good and their bowlers have been fantastic so far the only issue has been that of their feilding with many dropped catches. Virat Kohli and Ab de villiers seem to be in great form and the new sensation DevDutt Padikal seems to be taking RCB off the blocks very early in the innings giving them a good chance to put up a big total. Overall it looks like an RCB match here but when it comes to the ipl no one can say for sure. 

Join us live at 12 pm in another exciting live stream of Matchday live with Cheeka. Kris Srikkanth and Anirudha Srikkanth take you on wonderful live stream experience in cricket that has never been experienced before in youtube. Join in the conversation, give your views and most importantly ask your questions while cheeka and ani go about their analysis.

snippet.title: NEW! Ep 3156 - Bhide Talks To Students | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi

snippet.title: Pinjara Khubsurti Ka | पिंजरा खुबसूरती का | Episode 179 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Omkar informs Mayura that he has found Tara and he wants to talk to her. But in a chain of events, he ends up losing his eyesight. Watch the sneak peek of the upcoming episode to find out what drastic event happens.
#ColorsTV #PinjaraKhubsurtiKa

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. What happens to her fight for individuality when she ends up in a marriage with Omkar, a control freak obsessed with her beauty? Will he ever see his wife beyond her physical form? Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?

Episode 3155 : Vinod Gathers A Mob OF Parents.
---------------------------------------------------------
Vinod asks Jethalal that was he able to convince Bhide. To which Jethalal answered Bhide is not convinced. Vinod then gets angry and calls for a mob of parents on Bhide. Bhide on the other hand is worried about how will he pay back all the fees. To know more watch the full episode.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: डाळ तांदूळ न भिजवता आणि आंबवता बनवा इन्स्टंट डोसा | Instant Crispy Dosa | No Fermentation | Madhura
snippet.description:
#InstantDosa #NoFermentationDosa #DosaRecipe

इन्स्टंट डोसा बवण्यासाठी लागणारे साहित्य

Madhura's recipe Masala (Pack of 3)  - https://amzn.to/2L6y13i
Madhurasrecipe Kanda Lasoon Masala - https://amzn.to/3okkjrP
Madhurasrecipe Byadgi Mirchi Masala - https://amzn.to/3hKvRSU
Madhurasrecipe Goda Masala - https://amzn.to/3hRjsg6
Flipkart - https://bityl.co/4Ip9
किंवा ९१३६८२२२२४ या नंबर वर व्हॉटसऍप मेसेज करा  

मधुराज रेसिपी मसाले ऑर्डर कसे करायचे यासाठी हा विडिओ पहा
https://youtu.be/9Db_owqWJe4

We already have seen 4-5 dosa recipes like paper dosa, masala dosa, mysore masala dosa, davangiri dosa etc. In every recipe you need to soak dal and rice, grind them and fermentation of batter. You just can’t make dosa whenever you feel like. But in today’s recipe we are making instant dosa using dal and rice only. You can avoid all above steps and make dosa whenever you want. This dosa turns out nice, crispy exactly like fermented batter dosa. You can try this recipe at home and drop a comment for me. Do not forget to like, share and subscribe.

Ingredients:
• 1 cup Rice
• 1/4 cup Urad dal
• 1/4 cup Poha / Flattened rice
• 1/4 tsp Fenugreek seeds
• 1 Lemon juice
• 1/2 tsp Sugar
• A little Water 
• Salt to taste
• 1 tsp Eno fruit salt
• Oil
 
Method:
• In a bowl take rice, urad dal, poha, fenugreek seeds and mix well. 
• Wash everything well together 3-4 times with water. 
• Transfer the mixture into a blender jar and add lemon juice, sugar, water. 
• You can use 1/2 cup curd or buttermilk in place of lemon juice. 
• Blend everything well together into smooth paste. 
• Transfer the batter into a bowl and add salt, eno fruit salt. 
• Mix well quickly and dosa batter is ready. 
• Heat up a pan on medium heat and spread oil. 
• Turn the heat to low. 
• Add the batter at the center and spread it evenly. 
• Turn the heat to high, cover and cook for about 2 minutes. 
• Remove the lid and cook until lower side gets nice brown color. 
• When lower side gets nice browning brush a little oil on upper side and loosen the edges. 
• Fold the dosa and transfer it into a serving dish. 
• Instant dosa is all ready. 
• Serve the dosa with sambar and chutney.

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 28 April 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara’s birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can’t tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

snippet.title: Shah Rule – Don’t Forgive Me ft. DIVINE | Prod. by Stunnah Beatz & KookUp | Official Audio
snippet.description:
➟ Download & Stream Hooked EP: https://mai.lnk.to/hooked 
#ShahRule #Divine 

➟ Spotify: https://mai.lnk.to/hooked/spotify 
➟ Gaana: https://mai.lnk.to/hooked/gaana 
➟ Apple Music: https://mai.lnk.to/hooked/applemusic 
➟ Wynk: https://mai.lnk.to/hooked/wynk 
➟ JioSaavn: https://www.jiosaavn.com/album/hooked/t-Lbcsdhw94_  
➟ Amazon Prime Music: https://mai.lnk.to/hooked/amazonmusic 
➟ Tidal Music: https://tidal.com/browse/album/181420259 
➟ Youtube Music: https://mai.lnk.to/hooked/youtubemusic 

“Don’t Forgive Me” is an unapologetic anthem for anyone who has faced hatred, betrayal and disloyalty. A slower paced track for Shah Rule and DIVINE to lyrically open up about the past, present, and the future, with a repetitive hook serving as a mantra of always coming out a stronger person through any hardship.

Shah Rule’s tongue-in-cheek debut EP - Hooked (out now) speaks the unspoken conversation we as humans have with ourselves about dealing with our modern day vices.

➟ Hooked EP Tracklist:
1. Shah Rule Ft. Meba Ofilia - Hooked
2. Shah Rule - Khara Sona 
3. Shah Rule Ft. Frenzzy, Sikander Kahlon - Clap Clap
4. Shah Rule - Khaas 
5. Shah Rule Ft. Diesby - Memes
6. Shah Rule Ft. DIVINE - Don't Forgive Me

🎧 Audio Credits: 
➟ Artist & Lyrics: Shah Rule Ft. DIVINE 
➟ Co-Composers: Shah Rule, DIVINE, Stunnah Beatz, KookUp
➟ Produced By: Stunnah Beatz
➟ Mixed By: Shah Rule
➟ Mastering Engineer: Hanish Taneja
➟ Recorded By: Rahul Shahani

🎬 Video Credits:
➟ Cover Art: Noiz
➟ Visualiser: Purvanshi

Lyrics: 
DIVINE (Intro)
Ey
Mujhe maaf mat kar, mujhe maaf mat kar!
Wassup Stunnah!
Shah Rule!
Gully Gang boy!

Hook: 
Don’t Forgive me
If u think I gave a f*** at all
Don’t forgive me
It was u who picked the wrong battle
Don’t Forgive me
I never gave a f*** at all
Don’t forgive me
I’ll fool you twice, do not take the gamble

Verse 1
In n out one ear
Every time you talk to me
Don’t even roll the dice
I don’t play monopoly 
You don’t need the key
Can’t hit these harmonies 
Cry a river or sea
I don’t do r&b
Give me
Respect, don’t mean the cc
Come Correct, u won’t get zzs 
Sleep is not for my species
Cuz I don’t Take Ls or defeat
And u could never walk my path without these feet
Im like Jordan, the secondary he threepeat 
But No last dance, pull up and repeat

Hook:
Don’t Forgive me
If u think I gave a f*** at all
Don’t forgive me
It was u who picked the wrong battle
Don’t Forgive me
I never gave a f*** at all
Don’t forgive me
I’ll fool you twice, do not take the gamble

Verse 2 (DIVINE)
Mujhse baat mat kar
Mujhe maaf mat kar
Jee raha hu zindagi
Kitaab bankar

Mera bhai mujhe khela 
usne saanp ban kar
Mera khaas member
Nikla saanp ban kar

Bohot andar Soul senser
Koi paida nahi kar sakta krodh andar
Rakta mann ko saaf zubaan ko ganda
Sab maangte haath sirf 6 de kandha

Tu daisy champa
Humein charas ka anta
Hisaab mein phukte 
Humein talab nahi lagta

Tu kya bole
Humein farak nahi padhta 
Sab fayda dekhte
Ye puraana dhanda

Meri naani boli
Vishwas todhte log, dosti chodh
Parivaar sabkuch ye code mat todh
Seedha bol, jo bhi bolna uske muh pe bol

Hook: 
Don’t Forgive me
I never gave a f*** at all
Don’t forgive me
I’ll fool you twice, do not take the gamble

Verse 3 (Shah Rule)
Won’t play me out to be the fool
Forgive and don’t forget, respect the rule
Won’t catch me being the loudest in the room
Keep it hundred with my family and my crew (gully gang!)
2020, my vision never been clearer
Look past my bulls*** on this black mirror
A Reel monster starring in my own triller
I’m Addicted I need another hit no filler!
If your grind does not align or match with mine
So imma give you the embargo
Because I been tryna’ rhyme to stand the rest of time 
No temporary bars like flacko (asap!)
Because a king needs a queen I don’t need a rook
And she came to the show, she left the show shook
From Overlooked to overbooked, 
My open book has just started and I know you’re hooked!

Follow Shah Rule: 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/shahrulemusic/ 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/shahrulemusic 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/iamshahrule 

Follow DIVINE: 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vivianakadivine/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/viviandivineindia
Twitter: https://twitter.com/VivianDivine

Follow Mass Appeal India: 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/massappealindia 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/massappealindia 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/MassAppealIndia 

Follow Gully Gang:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/gullygangindia 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/GullyGangOfficial 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/gullygangindia

Humein charas ka anta
Hisaab mein phukte 
Humein talab nahi lagta

Tu kya bole
Humein farak nahi padhta 
Sab fayda dekhte
Ye puraana dhanda

Meri naani boli
Vishwas todhte log, dosti chodh
Parivaar sabkuch ye code mat todh
Seedha bol, jo bhi bolna uske muh pe bol

Hook: 
Don’t Forgive me
I never gave a f*** at all
Don’t forgive me
I’ll fool you twice, do not take the gamble

Verse 3 (Shah Rule)
Won’t play me out to be the fool
Forgive and don’t forget, respect the rule
Won’t catch me being the loudest in the room
Keep it hundred with my family and my crew (gully gang!)
2020, my vision never been clearer
Look past my bulls*** on this black mirror
A Reel monster starring in my own triller
I’m Addicted I need another hit no filler!
If your grind does not align or match with mine
So imma give you the embargo
Because I been tryna’ rhyme to stand the rest of time 
No temporary bars like flacko (asap!)
Because a king needs a queen I don’t need a rook
And she came to the show, she left the show shook
From Overlooked to overbooked, 
My open book has just started and I know you’re hooked!

snippet.title: क्या होगा Bhide Classes बंद? -Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता-Ep 3156-30thApril, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/dplnk?schema=sony://asset/1000116776#utm_source=YOUTUBE&utm_medium=slate&utm_campaign=YT_traffic

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Episode 3156 : Bhide Shutting His Classes 
---------------------------------------------------------
Bhide wants to close his classes and so champaklal is explaining him that shutting down the classes won't help and it will affect the future and the career of the children too. So Bhide has to make a decision. For more, watch the full episode.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.description:
Fitoor - Episode 20 Teaser - 29th April 2021 - HAR PAL GEO

https://bit.ly/30JSSPr Did you know Har Pal Geo is now in the US? Subscribe and hit the bell icon to catch Top Pakistani Dramas and satisfy all your entertainment needs

Fitoor narrates a love story that transcends above all as a person in love is bound to forget about the worries of the past and the uncertainty of the future.
Despite being a successful architect, Haider feels lacking in his love life as he is still living with the memories of his love interest. On the other hand, Dilnasheen who hails from a middle-class background is deeply in love with her best friend's brother Hamza and both vows to be with each other forever without realizing the difficulties they might have to overcome. Living in her present, Dilnasheen�s life takes an unfortunate turn when she crosses paths with Haider. Will Haider and Dilnasheen be able to forget their past and move on in their lives? Or will the past pay them a visit when they begin to settle down? Will Haider and Dilnasheen be able to distinguish between their past and present?

snippet.title: Harano Sur  - Full Episode | 28 April 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Harano Sur" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Harano Sur: Shashanka Shekhar, the music maestro, is spellbound by Ahana’s singing and wants to get her married to his son Nakshatra. He is inclined towards popular music over classical & is more renowned than his father. He is against marrying a singer. Coincidentally, he also meets Ahana & she appears to be someone who doesn’t care about his celebrity status or lavish lifestyle. He gets married to Ahana, without knowing about her singing abilities. What will happen when Nakshatra gets to know about Ahana’s singing abilities? Will music cause divide between them?

snippet.title: India's COVID-19 crisis: Growing fears that international aid may be too late to avert disaster
snippet.description:
International aid has finally arrived in India, as the health-care system grapples with a worsening COVID-19 crisis. 

The world’s second-most populated nation is embroiled in a health crisis, with hospitals and morgues overwhelmed. On Thursday, India’s total COVID-19 cases surpassed 18 million. Over the past week, the country has continuously set new global records for daily infections and deaths.

Thursday was no different. India reported more than 370,000 new infections and 3,645 deaths — the highest number of fatalities in a single day since the start of the pandemic.

But as Crystal Goomansingh explains, the help may have come too late to save the country from the worst of the pandemic.

For more information, go to https://globalnews.ca/news/7819412/india-covid-crisis-doctors-red-cross/ 

Subscribe to Global News Channel HERE: http://bit.ly/20fcXDc
Like Global News on Facebook HERE: http://bit.ly/255GMJQ

snippet.title: Saudi Arabia के Crown Prince Mohammed Bin Salman ने Quran को बताया Constitution (BBC Hindi)
snippet.description:
सऊदी अरब के क्राउन प्रिंस मोहम्मद बिन सलमान ने देश के नेशनल टेलीविजन को दिए इंटरव्यू में कई अहम मुद्दों पर बात की है. इसमें उन्होंने भारत का भी नाम लिया और भारत से अच्छे संबंधों की वकालत की. कोराना महामारी के कारण तेल से हासिल होने वाले राजस्व पर निर्भर सऊदी अरब की अर्थव्यवस्था भी बुरी तरह से प्रभावित हुई है. ऐसे में कहा जा रहा था कि अब तक सऊदी अरब इनकम टैक्स नहीं लगाता था लेकिन आने वाले दिनों में लगा सकता है. लेकिन क्राउन प्रिंस ने इन अटकलों को ख़ारिज कर दिया है. प्रिंस सलमान ने इंटरव्यू में कहा कि सऊदी अरब में इनकम टैक्स लागू करने की कोई योजना नहीं है. पिछले साल जुलाई महीने में सऊदी अरब ने अस्थायी रूप से वैट को पाँच फ़ीसदी से बढ़ाकर 15 फ़ीसदी कर दिया था. क्राउन प्रिंस ने संविधान को लेकर कहा कि क़ुरान ही संविधान है.

स्टोरी: टीम बीबीसी
आवाज़: विशाल शुक्ला
वीडियो एडिटिंग: मनीष जालुई

#SaudiArabia #Quran #MohammedBinSalman

Corona Virus से जुड़े और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए यहां क्लिक करें : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=npgvIvfmNkE&list=PLYxuvEJLss6ByutcqkthikPxV3ccUkwPB

कोरोना वायरस से जुड़ी सारी प्रामाणिक ख़बरें पढ़ने के लिए क्लिक करें : https://www.bbc.com/hindi/international-51848794

ऐसे ही और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए चैनल सब्सक्राइब ज़रूर करें-
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCN7B-QD0Qgn2boVH5Q0pOWg?disable_polymer=true

बीबीसी हिंदी से आप इन सोशल मीडिया चैनल्स पर भी जुड़ सकते हैं-

फ़ेसबुक- https://www.facebook.com/BBCnewsHindi
ट्विटर- https://twitter.com/BBCHindi
इंस्टाग्राम- https://www.instagram.com/bbchindi/

बीबीसी हिंदी का एंड्रॉयड ऐप डाउनलोड करने के लिए क्लिक करें- https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=uk.co.bbc.hindi

🎧 सुनिए The Ranveer Show इन Audio Platforms पे :-

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/3ptiw7nOKh5vsMoar79YGc

✅ हमारा अंग्रेजी चैनल: https://www.youtube.com/c/BeerBicepsOfficial
 
🎥 हमारा अंग्रेजी PODCAST देखिए : https://www.youtube.com/c/TheRanveerShowClips


नमस्ते दोस्तों!
आज के खास Vlog में, मैं आपको लेकर चलूंगा मेरे Past, Present और Future में। 
चलिए मेरे साथ मेरे New Startup के Building Process को देखते हैं और ढ़ेर सारे New Business Ideas को साथ में Discuss करते हैं। 
मैं अपना New Startup बना रहा हूँ Schbang Company के Co-Founder यानि Harshil Karia के साथ। हमारे New Startup का Goal ये है कि हम लोग सबकी Help करेंगे। हम लोगों की मदद ये जानने में करेंगे कि कैसे हम अपना Peak Potential Achieve कर सकते हैं। इस New Startup का नाम है 'BigBrain Company'.
इसके बाद हम जाएंगे Monk Entertainment Office जहाँ आप मेरे Team Members से मिल सकते हैं जैसे कि Viraj Sheth, Aayush Tiwari, Iqlipse Nova, Dev Raiyanii, Taneesho, Alina Namazi, Archit Meher, Ashana Sule और Tarini Shah से। 
और साथ ही साथ हम करेंगे ढ़ेर सारी मस्ती Salil Jamdar और Yash Talreja के साथ। 
आखिर में Viraj Sheth और मैं Chill करने के लिए कहाँ जाते हैं जानने के लिए इस Vlog को आखिर तक ज़रूर देखें सिर्फ और सिर्फ आपके Favourite BeerBiceps Hindi Channel Ranveer Allahbadia पर।

#love #vlog


INSTAGRAM - HINDI : @ranveerallahbadia
https://www.instagram.com/ranveerallahbadia/

INSTAGRAM - ENGLISH : @beerbiceps 
https://www.instagram.com/beerbiceps/ 

FACEBOOK - HINDI: https://www.facebook.com/ranveerallahbadiaofficial/

FACEBOOK - ENGLISH: https://www.facebook.com/beerbiceps/

TWITTER : @beerbicepsguy
https://twitter.com/BeerBicepsGuy

LINKEDIN : @beerbiceps
https://www.linkedin.com/in/BeerBiceps

SNAPCHAT: @beerbicepsguy

---------------------------------------------

About :

Ranveer Allahbadia एक Self Improvement और Self Help Channel है।
हमने Channel की शुरुआत Fitness और Health Videos से की थी।
फिर धीरे-धीरे हमने Fashion, Grooming, Personal Finance, Etiquette, Meditation, Mental Health, Communication Skills और Entrepreneurship जैसे Topics पर भी ढ़ेर सारे Videos बनाए।

आज Ranveer Allahbadia Channel पर नए भारत का नया Podcast The Ranveer Show हिंदी या TRS हिंदी भी Available है।
एक ऐसा Show जहाँ हम आपके साथ Share करते हैं ढ़ेर सारे Success Stories और हर Success के पीछे छुपे Success Secrets. 
#TheRanveerShow का हर Conversation होता है Intellectual, Deep और Informational.
Entrepreneurs हो या Bollywood Stars से लेकर Athletes तक हर कोई हमारे Podcast का हिस्सा रह चुका है। हमारे Podcast का हर एक Conversation आपको देगा Extreme Learning Experience.

अपने पसंद के Videos को देखने के लिए हमारे Home Page पर दिए गए Playlist को ज़रूर Check करें।

आखिर में Viraj Sheth और मैं Chill करने के लिए कहाँ जाते हैं जानने के लिए इस Vlog को आखिर तक ज़रूर देखें सिर्फ और सिर्फ आपके Favourite BeerBiceps Hindi Channel Ranveer Allahbadia पर।

snippet.title: Jethalal और Bhide की नोक झोक | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Viewer's Choice
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

We bring you the most-watched videos of your favorite show, Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah, under one roof. So sit back and enjoy these videos.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: 
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.
